_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-23 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 3/6, PE 0/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1434.9 is above EMA18 (1414.01) and EMA50 (1365.07) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (28.9) is above its signal line (28.82) -- bullish momentum (+1 CE) | price is between pivot support (1430.6) and resistance (1458.6) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 1.18%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
